descriptions.text:
Samurai Shodown! 2 is a handheld game in SNK's Samurai Shodown series of fighting games. Unlike its predecessor, it was released on the Neo-Geo Pocket Color system, so its graphics were no longer monochrome.

It was designed as a conversion from the most recent game in the Samurai Shodown series, Samurai Shodown 64: Warriors Rage, and almost all of its story events, endings and cutscenes are derived from its arcade cousin. Almost all of the characters from Samurai Shodown 64: Warriors Rage are included (the sole exception being Hanma Yagyu). It also re-added two series favorites who were not in the arcade, Charlotte and Yagyu Jubei.

Samurai Shodown! 2 (Japanese title: Samurai Spirits! 2 / サムライスピリッツ! 2) is a handheld game in SNK's Samurai Shodown series of fighting games, released on the Neo-Geo Pocket Color in 1999. Unlike its predecessor, which was released for the monochrome Neo Geo Pocket, it features full color graphics. It was designed as a conversion from the most recent game in the Samurai Shodown series, Samurai Shodown 64: Warriors Rage, and almost all of its story events, endings and cutscenes are derived from its arcade cousin. Almost all of the characters from Samurai Shodown 64: Warriors Rage are included (the sole exception being Hanma Yagyu). It also re-added two series favorites who were not in the arcade release, Charlotte and Yagyu Jubei.
The game was ported to the Nintendo Switch, and was offered as a digital pre-order bonus for Samurai Shodown (2019). This version was later released as part of Neo Geo Pocket Color Selection Vol. 1 in 2021.
Samurai Shodown! 2: Pocket Fighting Series est un jeu vidéo de combat développé et édité par SNK. Il est sorti sur console portable Neo-Geo Pocket Color  en 1999.

Samurai Shodown! 2 (título en japonés: Samurai Spirits! 2 / サムライスピリッツ! 2) es un videojuego portátil de la serie Samurai Shodown de SNK, lanzado para Neo-Geo Pocket Color en 1999. A diferencia de su predecesor, su predecesor, que se lanzó para Neo Geo Pocket monocromo, presenta gráficos a todo color. Fue diseñado como una conversión del juego más reciente de la serie Samurai Shodown, Samurai Shodown 64: Warriors Rage, y casi todos sus eventos argumentales, finales y cinemáticas derivan de su versión arcade. Casi todos los personajes de Samurai Shodown 64: Warriors Rage están incluidos (con la única excepción de Hanma Yagyu). También se reincorporaron dos personajes favoritos de la serie que no estaban en la versión arcade: Charlotte y Yagyu Jubei.
El juego fue portado a Nintendo Switch y se ofreció como bono de reserva digital para Samurai Shodown (2019). Esta versión se lanzó posteriormente como parte de Neo Geo Pocket Color Selection Vol. 1 en 2021.

Samurai Shodown! 2 (conhecido também por Samurai Spirits! 2 "サムライスピリッツ! 2" na versão japonesa; ou SS!2) é um jogo não-canônico da série Samurai Shodown, desenvolvida pela SNK. Ao contrário de seu predecessor, ele foi lançado para o sistema Neo-Geo Pocket Color, fazendo com que seus gráficos não sejam mais monocromáticos.
Foi desenvolvido como uma conversão do jogo Samurai Shodown: Warriors Rage e a quase todos os eventos da história, endings e cenas, são derivados de sua origem de arcade. Inesperadamente, o jogo acabou sendo uma re-edição robusta, com todos os personagens de SS:WR incluídos (exceto por Hanma Yagyu). Foi também re-adicionado dois personagens famosos da série que não estavam na versão do arcade: Charlotte e Jubei Yagyu.
